title: File Picker Removal Icon Not Displaying
symptom: The icon to remove an item from the file-picker list is missing, while other icons are functioning correctly.
not_this_if: Icons are missing due to custom styling or overrides
root_cause: The file-picker component relies on the Lucide icon library for displaying certain icons. If Lucide is not included in the project, specific icons, such as the removal icon, will not render.
fix_steps: Add the Lucide icon library to your project dependencies
Ensure the library is properly imported in your project files
Refresh the project to see the changes
agent_instruction: Add the Lucide icon library to your project to restore the missing removal icon.
